blurb_en: SpaceX agreed on June 16 to buy Anysphere — the company behind Cursor, the most widely used AI coding tool — in a $60 billion all-stock deal, three days after its blockbuster NASDAQ debut. Cursor has $2.6 billion in annualized enterprise revenue and sits directly in the path of Anthropic's Claude Code and Microsoft's GitHub Copilot. The acquisition formalizes an April option SpaceX held to either invest $10 billion or buy outright for $60 billion; it chose the latter. SpaceX and xAI had already been jointly training a model with Cursor for months, running on xAI's Colossus supercomputers. The rocket company just bought the thing that helps people write rocket software.
blurb_zh: SpaceX 6月16日宣布以600亿美元全股票方式收购 Cursor 母公司 Anysphere，距其纳斯达克上市仅三天。Cursor 是目前使用最广泛的 AI 代码工具，年化 B2B 营收约26亿美元，直接对标 Anthropic 的 Claude Code 和微软的 GitHub Copilot。SpaceX 与 xAI 已在 Colossus 超算上与 Cursor 联合训练模型数月，合并后将集成进 Cursor 与 Grok Build。这家火箭公司，收购了帮人写火箭软件的工具。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch (June 16), CNBC, Bloomberg, Engadget, NBC News. Deal structure (all-stock, Q3 close, April option origin) consistent across all sources. $2.6B ARR confirmed by Bloomberg.

blurb_en: Adobe updated Creative Cloud on June 15 and put a movie studio inside Lightroom. The new Photo to Video feature converts stills into animated clips using Adobe Firefly and Google Veo — pick a preset motion or write your own prompt. Assisted Culling is now generally available with Face View, which identifies individual subjects and scores eye sharpness across an entire shoot. AI Sharpen integrates Topaz Labs' Noise-Aware model directly, eliminating the export step. After Effects replaced its decade-old Roto Brush with an AI Object Matte system built on four selection tools. Photoshop's Remove Tool now runs on-device, no internet required. The net effect: photographers now have a video pipeline, and video editors have rotoscoping handled.
blurb_zh: 6月15日，Adobe 更新 Creative Cloud，在 Lightroom 里内置了一个小电影工厂。新增「照片转视频」功能，通过 Adobe Firefly 和 Google Veo 将静态图片生成为运动短片——选模板或自由输入镜头指令。AI 智能选片全面开放，新增面部视图：自动识别各个人物并评分眼部清晰度。AI 锐化直接内置 Topaz Labs 降噪感知模型，无需再导出到第三方软件。After Effects 用 AI 驱动的「对象遮罩」系统替换了服役多年的 Roto Brush。Photoshop 的去除工具也可完全离线运行。摄影师现在有了视频工作流，剪辑师从此不用手动抠图。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Adobe official blog (June 15), 9to5Mac, AppleInsider, Digital Camera World (Lightroom Photo to Video), PetaPixel (AI user controls), RedShark News (full update summary). Feature details consistent across all sources.

blurb_en: Deezer launched a free AI music detection tool on June 11 that scans playlists across 20 streaming platforms — including Spotify, Apple Music, SoundCloud, and YouTube Music — and flags tracks generated by tools like Suno and Udio. Users connect their streaming credentials; the scanner surfaces AI-generated songs across their playlists. Deezer claims 99.8% accuracy across 27 languages. In April, Deezer disclosed that 44% of tracks uploaded daily to its own platform are AI-generated; it has now turned that internal detection system into a public service for its competitors' users. The company with the most AI music in its catalog is now offering to clean up everyone else's.
blurb_zh: Deezer 于6月11日推出免费 AI 音乐识别工具，可扫描 Spotify、Apple Music、SoundCloud、YouTube Music 等20个流媒体平台的歌单，标记由 Suno、Udio 等工具生成的曲目，官方宣称准确率达99.8%，支持27种语言。用户授权登录后，扫描器即可在歌单中找出 AI 生成曲目。今年4月，Deezer 曾披露其自家平台每日上传歌曲中44%是 AI 生成的；如今它把内部检测系统对外开放，替竞争对手的用户提供服务。曲库里 AI 音乐最多的平台，现在来帮别人净化曲库。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch (June 11), MacRumors (June 11), EDM.com, technology.org (June 15). Key details (20 platforms, 99.8% accuracy claim, 27 languages, Suno/Udio detection) consistent across multiple sources.

blurb_en: Nearly 40,000 tech workers lost jobs in May — the highest single-month total in two years, and the third consecutive month AI was the most-cited reason for cuts across every industry, per outplacement firm Challenger, Gray & Christmas. Total 2026 tech layoffs have reached 183,966 workers across 247 events; AI was cited in 55% of those cuts. TechCrunch called it a powder keg: tens of thousands of displaced workers landing in an unusually unforgiving job market at exactly the moment AI insiders are seeing once-in-a-generation paper wealth materialize. AI is not obligated to share the upside.
blurb_zh: 五月单月近4万名科技工作者失业——两年内单月最高，且连续第三个月 AI 被列为各行业裁员的首要原因（数据来源：职业过渡机构 Challenger, Gray & Christmas）。2026年迄今科技裁员总数已达183,966人，247起裁员事件中55%明确提及 AI。TechCrunch 将局势定性为「火药桶」：数万名被裁员工在就业市场最严峻的时期失业，而 AI 行业内部人士正坐享百年一遇的财富增值。算法没有义务分红。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch (June 15). Layoff data from Challenger, Gray & Christmas outplacement firm. 183,966 figure corroborated by skillsyncer.com tracker and Tom's Hardware coverage.
